description: Single source-of-truth regex patterns for Pre-Review Data Readiness enforcement. Consumed by post-propose-manual-review-check.sh (via jq) and vendor/scripts/review-gui.mts (via import).

patterns.description: 模糊指代詞命中（per manual-review.md Pre-Review Data Readiness）— item description 使用「某張」「某筆」「任一」等抽象指代，未 inline 具體 sample identifier
patterns.regex: 某張|某筆|某個|任一張|任一筆|隨便一張|找一張|挑一筆|找某筆|現有的一筆|適合的一筆|\bany [A-Z]|\bsome [A-Z]|\ba record\b|\bpick one\b|\bfind a [A-Za-z]+\b|\ban existing one\b
patterns.remediation: Replace abstract reference with specific sample identifier (PK, UUID, business key, NFC UID) from docs/FIXTURES.md and ensure the sample is persisted in supabase/seed.sql under ## N. Fixtures / Seed Plan.

patterns.description: 描述提及 NFC / 刷卡 / 員工卡 / staff UID / card UID，但同一 item 內無具體 UID inline（parent block 含 sibling sub-items；sub-item 自身不獨立 fire）
patterns.anchor: manual-review.md#實體裝置--規格外輸入的替代路徑
patterns.remediation: Inline the specific card UID from docs/FIXTURES.md (4-byte UID like 04A1B2C3, or 7-byte UID like 04469C0FCB2A81, or stable seed key like TDMS-SEED-* / TEST-*); ensure the card is seeded persistently. For dev override path, reference the env-gated `Dev: card UID` input or `/__dev/scan?uid=...` endpoint. The UID MUST appear in the item description with explicit context (e.g., `card_uid=04A1B2C3`, UID `04A1B2C3`, or `04469C0FCB2A81`).

patterns.description: [review:ui] / [verify:ui] item 描述未出現具體 URL（http:// / https:// / /xxx path）— 只說『kiosk 頁』『dashboard』『設定頁』不算
patterns.remediation: Add a specific URL (e.g., http://localhost:8787/kiosk/workstation or /admin/kiosk-tokens?card_uid=...) so the reviewer can navigate directly. Generic labels like『kiosk page』『dashboard』『設定頁』are insufficient.

patterns.description: parent item line 含 ≥ 2 個串接動詞（→ chain 或重複的『然後』『接著』），但未拆 #N.M scoped sub-items
patterns.remediation: Split the flow chain into #N.M scoped sub-items (one atomic action per line: open X → input Y → click Z → confirm W). Each sub-item must include a falsifiable observation (specific toast text, badge state, route change, field value).

patterns.description: [review:ui] item 描述含 HTTP method + /api path 或 → status code（明顯為 backend round-trip）— 違反 [review:ui] 收斂原則 hard rule，MUST 改 [verify:api] / [verify:e2e] / [verify:api+ui]
patterns.remediation: HTTP method + path 或 → status code 是定義上的 agent-verifiable evidence（curl / ofetch / Playwright 可重現）。把這類 backend round-trip 標 [review:ui] 等於把該由 agent 自驗的工作丟回 user，違反 propose 階段對 user 時間的尊重。Replace `[review:ui]` with: (a) `[verify:api]` for pure HTTP round-trip（主線跑 curl，寫 (verified-api: <ISO> <METHOD> <URL> <STATUS>) annotation）, (b) `[verify:e2e]` for persistence / multi-role journey requiring Playwright spec, (c) `[verify:api+ui]` for mutation + final-state visual confirmation. See manual-review.md「[review:ui] 收斂原則 hard rule」+「Kind 分類指引」反面範例。

rules: Trailing token on a ## 人工檢查 checkbox line
<reason> MUST be non-empty (empty brackets or bare marker without brackets are invalid and ignored)
Canonical ordering with other trailing markers: @followup[TD-NNN] @no-manual-review-check[<reason>] @no-screenshot
Hook and review-gui both skip pattern evaluation for marked items but emit info-level log naming the reason
